issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (passive effect during opponent's turn), not 'Activated'. The text '[Opponent's Turn]' indicates a continuous passive effect that triggers during the opponent's turn, not an activated ability.

Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. The effect text explicitly states '[Opponent's Turn]', which means the power boost applies specifically during the opponent's turn phase, not until end of turn.
Target should explicitly include type filter for {SWORD}. Current target only filters by cost; should add type:'Sword' to the filter.
